authority: Maria Smith alone assigns conclusions and official status.

applied_comparison.complete_prefix_route: hierarchical backbone and explicit sidechain graph hard exclusions

development_direction: V19 is the first explicit sidechain-graph route to improve both sealed L24 global measures over v13 while preserving its strongest length-four and length-five local windows. The next matched cumulative development gate should test whether that global-only separation propagates through 32 residues before spending a complete 76-residue execution.
full_trial_recommendation: Recommend a sealed matched 32-residue cumulative development benchmark next. If the global advance and local preservation propagate at 32 residues, proceed to a 76-residue cumulative development trial. Maria alone decides whether and when either run occurs.
theoretical_status: The measured dual global advance demonstrates a constructive continuation from explicit graph geometry; it establishes no theorem-derived wall on longer propagation.
